prestazioni: Engine: 3.3L Lambda II T-GDi V6 (G6DH) with a Garrett GTX4271R turbocharger upgrade, supporting 22 psi of boost for 650+ WHP on E85 fuel, paired with a Kia Motorsport-spec billet crankshaft and forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio).

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB LSD differential with a Kia Racing-developed 3.91 final drive ratio, mated to a ZF 8HP90 transmission reinforced with a PTT Performance valve body and upgraded torque converter (4,000+ stall).

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Stinger’s 50:50 weight distribution, paired with SuperPro bushings (polyurethane, 75D durometer) and H&R anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and GT-spec canards, reducing lift by 40% at 120 mph (verified in Kia’s wind tunnel).
Wheels: WORK Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +30 (front) and 19x11.5 +40 (rear) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear).

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with Kia Motorsport livery accents (red/black), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 50% weight reduction) and a Kia Racing-spec rear wing (adjustable angle, 3D-printed aluminum mounts).
